headline: How The Story Is Shifting For L3Harris Technologies (LHX) After Missile Spinout And 2028 Targets
summary: L3Harris Technologies is back in focus as analysts update their price targets following fresh company guidance and portfolio news. Recent research ties these higher targets to the refreshed 2028 framework and the planned missile solutions spinout backed by a US$1b preferred equity investment from the Department of War, rather than short term trading factors. As you read on, you will see how to follow the evolving narrative, what analysts are watching, and where the biggest debate points sit...

headline: Assessing L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Valuation After Strong Recent Returns And Premium P/E Multiple
summary: Why L3Harris Technologies (LHX) is on investors’ radar today L3Harris Technologies (LHX) is drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 2.3% over the past week but showing a small decline over the past month. headline: Can KTOS Become a Key Player in US Space Force Ground Systems?
summary: Kratos lands a $446.8 million U.S. Space Force contract, strengthening its role in missile tracking systems and expanding its footprint in space-based defense.
